page.title: Share Links
page.description: Manage trackable links, view engagement, and configure security.

empty.title: No links yet
empty.description: Configure permissions and create links to track investor and buyer engagement.
empty.filteredDescription: Create a link for this document to start tracking engagement.

delete.title: Delete Link
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete the share link for "{{documentTitle}}"? This link will stop working and visitors will no longer be able to view the document.

detail.trendEmpty: No visits yet. Trends appear after the first visit.

empty.title: No access records
empty.description: This link has not been visited yet; visitor behavior will appear here after sharing.

creator.draftDocsUnavailable: {{restored}} of {{expected}} document(s) from the saved draft are no longer available and have been removed.
creator.noDocuments: No available documents; please upload first.
creator.contactHelper: Access code will be sent to this contact
creator.contactSearchPlaceholder: Search contacts by name or email
creator.contactRequired: Please select a contact to send the verification code to.
creator.whitelistPlaceholder: Enter emails or domains separated by commas
creator.whitelistDesc: Only allow specified emails or domains to access the link
creator.passwordEmpty: Password is required when password protection is enabled
creator.passwordEditHint: Saved password is not displayed for security. Enter a new password to change it.
creator.whitelistEmpty: At least one email or domain is required when whitelist is enabled
creator.whitelistContactMismatch: Whitelist must include all selected contact emails. Missing: {{emails}}
creator.passwordDesc: Viewers must enter a predefined password to access
creator.ndaDesc: Viewers must sign an NDA online before accessing
creator.allowDownloadDesc: Allow viewers to download the original document
creator.watermarkDesc: Overlay viewer identity info on pages to prevent screenshot leaks
creator.requireEmailDesc: Viewers must verify their email to confirm identity
creator.aiCopilotDescription: Allow recipients to use AI assistant for intelligent Q&A and document analysis
creator.aiCopilotDesc: Allow viewers to use AI assistant for document analysis

customized.label: Custom
customized.description: Freely combine email verification, whitelist, password, NDA, and more
customized.usage: For scenarios with unique security requirements. Toggle individual access controls and content protection options as needed.
customized.friction: Flexible: adjust security strength and recipient friction to match your exact needs.

public.label: Public Distribution
public.description: No verification gates; maximize open rate
public.usage: For roadshow decks, white papers, press releases and public-facing materials. Links are accessible by anyone, with basic watermark traceability.
public.friction: Low friction: anyone with the link can view, ideal for maximizing reach.

standard.label: Standard DD
standard.description: Email verification + whitelist + watermark + download disabled
standard.usage: For fundraising due diligence, pitch decks and materials requiring identity verification without extreme confidentiality. Recommended default preset.
standard.friction: Balanced: verifies identity and restricts domains while keeping open rates high.

confidential.label: Confidential Data Room
confidential.description: All verification gates + NDA + download disabled
confidential.usage: For sensitive deal documents, legal contracts and trade secrets requiring highest security. Visitors must pass all gates and sign NDA before access.
confidential.friction: High security: multiple gates plus NDA for the most sensitive materials.

collaborative.label: Collaborative Review
collaborative.usage: For internal team review, joint editing and collaborative workflows. Downloads are enabled with watermark and access log traceability.
collaborative.friction: Collaboration-friendly: team members can download and review with traceability.

bundle.subtitle: Select multiple documents, configure security once, generate one share link.
bundle.unsavedConfirmDesc: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

documents.label: Documents
documents.selectPrompt: Select documents to include in this link bundle
documents.emptyHint: Choose documents from the left to include in this bundle

review.subtitle: Review before saving
review.successUpdate: Link updated! Recipients will see the latest changes on refresh.
review.saveConfirmDesc: Once saved, the distributed link will be updated immediately. Recipients will see the latest content after refreshing their browser. Are you sure you want to save?
